allow: PowerShell($loginRes = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"duongcmntang@gmail.com","password":"123456"}'; $token = $loginRes.data.access_token; Write-Host "TOKEN: $\($token.Substring\(0,40\)\)..."; $features = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/features?current=1&pageSize=50" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $features.data.results | Select-Object _id, name, path | Format-Table)
